revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[新島村]][[式根島]]80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[新島村]]の南西・[[式根島]]にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には[[明治]]45年（[[1912年]]）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは[[昭和]]28年（[[1953年]]）からで、昭和35年（[[1960年]]）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 == 祭神 == * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - [[事代主神]]の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[新島村]][[式根島]]80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[新島村]]の南西・[[式根島]]にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には[[明治]]45年（[[1912年]]）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは[[昭和]]28年（[[1953年]]）からで、昭和35年（[[1960年]]）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 == 祭神 == * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - [[事代主神]]の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[新島村]][[式根島]]80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[新島村]]の南西・[[式根島]]にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には[[明治]]45年（[[1912年]]）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは[[昭和]]28年（[[1953年]]）からで、昭和35年（[[1960年]]）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 == 祭神 == * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - [[事代主神]]の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

[[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|泊神社 (新島村)|version=102258949|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[新島村]][[式根島]]80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[新島村]]の南西・[[式根島]]にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には[[明治]]45年（[[1912年]]）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは[[昭和]]28年（[[1953年]]）からで、昭和35年（[[1960年]]）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 == 祭神 == * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - [[事代主神]]の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

拝殿 |所在地 = [[東京都]][[新島村]][[式根島]]80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、[[東京都]][[新島村]]の南西・[[式根島]]にある[[神社]]。 [[式内社]]である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 == 概要 == 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には[[明治]]45年（[[1912年]]）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは[[昭和]]28年（[[1953年]]）からで、昭和35年（[[1960年]]）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 == 祭神 == * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - [[事代主神]]の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 ==End Japanese== [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tomari Shrine'''|泊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}の南西・{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}45年（{{jalink|1912年|Q2077}}）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}28年（{{jalink|1953年|Q18585}}）からで、昭和35年（{{jalink|1960年|Q3754}}）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 === 祭神 === * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}の南西・{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}45年（{{jalink|1912年|Q2077}}）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}28年（{{jalink|1953年|Q18585}}）からで、昭和35年（{{jalink|1960年|Q3754}}）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 === 祭神 === * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

(P706) == * {{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}の南西・{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}45年（{{jalink|1912年|Q2077}}）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}28年（{{jalink|1953年|Q18585}}）からで、昭和35年（{{jalink|1960年|Q3754}}）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 === 祭神 === * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

(P706) == * {{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}の南西・{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}45年（{{jalink|1912年|Q2077}}）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}28年（{{jalink|1953年|Q18585}}）からで、昭和35年（{{jalink|1960年|Q3754}}）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 === 祭神 === * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 泊神社 |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 泊御途口大后明神（久爾都比咩命） |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 11月8日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=泊神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''泊神社'''（とまりじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|東京都|Q1490}}{{jalink|新島村|Q1204534}}の南西・{{jalink|式根島|Q1344326}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 {{jalink|式内社}}である'''久爾都比咩命神社'''（くにつひめのみことじんじゃ）に比定されている[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - 八百万の神。 === 概要 === 創建は不詳だが、式内社に比定されているので、起源は古代以前に遡る。 現在地には{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}45年（{{jalink|1912年|Q2077}}）に他の神を合祀しつつ、遷座した[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会。 「泊神社」という名前が使われるようになったのは{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}28年（{{jalink|1953年|Q18585}}）からで、昭和35年（{{jalink|1960年|Q3754}}）以降に拝殿の修理や神楽殿の新築などを順次行い、現在のような形態に整備された。 === 祭神 === * 泊御途口大后明神（みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん） - {{jalink|事代主神}}の后・久爾都比咩命（くにつひめのみこと）のこと。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - 式根島観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}{{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}{{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} on {{jalink|Shikine-jima|Q1344326}}, southwest of {{jalink|Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534}}, {{jalink|Tokyo|Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{jalink|1912|Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{jalink|1953|Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{jalink|1960|Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{jalink|Kotoshironushi|Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association {{DEFAULTSORT:とまりしんしや にいしまむら}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]]

{{ill|Shikine-jima|lt=Shikine-jima|ast|Shikinejima|ceb|Shikine-jima|de|Shikine-jima|en|Shikine-jima|envoyage|Shikinejima|es|Shikinejima|fa|شیکینه-جیما|fr|Shikine-jima|ja|式根島|ko|시키네섬|pt|Shikine-jima|ru|Сикине|sv|Shikine-jima|tr|Shikinejima|uk|Острів Сікіне|vi|Shikinejima|zh|式根島|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} [[JA:泊神社 (新島村)]] {{wikidata link|Q130689009}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tomari Shrine |画像= [[File:Tomari Shrine, Shikinejima, Tokyo, Japan.JPG|250px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:東京都島嶼部の神社]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]

Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}{{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}} 80-2 |位置 = {{Coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E|region:JP-13_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto) |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = November 8 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan|label=Tomari Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|coord={{coord|34|20|1.5|N|139|12|46.5|E}}}} }} '''Tomari Shrine''' (とまりじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} on {{ill|lt=Shikine-jima|Q1344326|WD=Q1344326|1=Shikine-jima}}, southwest of {{ill|lt=Niijima, Tokyo|Q1204534|WD=Q1204534|1=Niijima, Tokyo}}, {{ill|lt=Tokyo|Q1490|WD=Q1490|1=Tokyo}}. It is identified with '''Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (くにつひめのみことじんじゃ), a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}[https://yaokami.jp/1131744/ 泊神社] - Yaoyorozu no Kami. === Overview === Its founding is unknown, but as it is identified with a Shikinaisha, its origin goes back to at least ancient times. In {{ill|lt=1912|Q2077|WD=Q2077|1=1912}} (Meiji 45), it was moved to the current site while enshrining other deities together[https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association. The name "Tomari Shrine" began to be used in {{ill|lt=1953|Q18585|WD=Q18585|1=1953}} (Shōwa 28), and from {{ill|lt=1960|Q3754|WD=Q3754|1=1960}} (Shōwa 35) onward repairs to the worship hall and new construction of a kagura hall were carried out step by step, forming its present layout. === Enshrined deity === * Tomari Mitokuchi Ōkisaki Myōjin (みとのくち おおきさきみょうじん) - Kunitsuhime-no-Mikoto, consort of {{ill|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|Q8009611|WD=Q8009611|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://shikinejima.tokyo/learn/historic/historic_place/1062/ 泊神社] - Shikinejima Tourism Association == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tomari Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shrines in the Islands of Tokyo Metropolis]] [[Category:新島村の建築物]] [[Category:新島村の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]
